tagline: Cinematic RPA effort estimation command center.

features.title: Connect harness-sdlc operating model
features.summary: Add repo instructions, feature registry, specs, progress files, and command prompts so TimeEstimator can be improved through controlled agentic SDLC workflows. No app code changes are included.

features.title: Cinematic frontend command center
features.summary: Rebuild the main UX into a cinematic RPA estimation command center with executive totals, guided activity capture, risk/assumption panels, export-ready summaries, accessibility, and responsive behavior.

features.title: Cinematic n8n integration
features.summary: The implementation was merged through PR #4. Closure remains blocked by RPT-001 Print/PDF pagination, RPT-002 unbounded PNG export, and remaining browser QA. The merged code remains in main and is not reverted.

features.title: Estimation engine hardening
features.summary: Separate calculation logic from page UI, formalize formulas, add deterministic tests, handle invalid inputs, and make the effort matrix auditable.

features.title: Report and export pack
features.summary: Create stakeholder-ready exports including PNG, JSON metadata, CSV/Excel-ready activity data, and a clean executive summary surface.

features.title: GitHub Pages deploy hardening
features.summary: Fix static export configuration, AI-flow stubbing strategy, build gates, and workflow verification for reliable Pages deployment.

features.title: AI-assisted estimation workflow
features.summary: Define safe AI/n8n/Genkit assistance for parsing process steps, suggesting estimates, summarizing assumptions, and preserving deterministic user control.

features.title: Project Discovery & Estimation Studio
features.summary: Phases 1, 2, 3, and 4A are merged on main. Phases 5–6 are in progress on feature/008-documentation-flow under issue #13 and Draft PR #14, adding structured documentation generation, manual-safe regeneration, deterministic Mermaid and textual projections, and a BPMN-compatible boundary while preserving formulas and browser-local compatibility.
